string.text: Hold your cursor over a weapon in any inventory list (yours, a corpse, a crate, a trade screen) and press the key to detach every addon on it - scope, silencer, grenade launcher - in one go. Uses the same detach actions as the right-click menu, so results (items, sounds) are identical. Leave the key unbound to disable.
Write field-strip actions (hovered weapon, addons removed) to the game log file.
